name: Baumann Park
description: Come play pickleball at Baumann Park in Cherry Valley, IL! There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Darryl F. Lindberg Park - Loves Park Playground
description: Darryl F. Lindberg Park - Loves Park Playground is a place to play pickleball in Loves Park, IL. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Hononegah High School
description: Hononegah High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rockton, IL. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Lake Summerset
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Summerset in Davis, IL! There are 6 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: NetLynx Sports Warehouse
description: NetLynx Sports Warehouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Loves Park, IL. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Nick Saelens Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Nick Saelens Memorial Park in Durand, IL! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Settler's Park
description: Settler's Park is a place to play pickleball in Rockton, IL. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Sinnissippi Park
description: Sinnissippi Park is a place to play pickleball in Rockford, IL. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: UW Health Sports Factory
description: Come play pickleball at UW Health Sports Factory in Rockford, IL! There are 12 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Victory Pickleball
description: Victory Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Loves Park, IL. There are 15 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, adaptive programming, wheelchair accessibility, trainers or lessons, a pro shop or equipment store, and lights. Reservations are available.

name: Westlake Village
description: Westlake Village is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Winnebago, IL. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.
